sentences.arabic: كَانَتْ هَنَاءُ خَجُولَةً وَلَا تَتَكَلَّمُ أَمَامَ النَّاسِ.
sentences.translation: Hana je bila stidljiva i nije govorila pred ljudima.
sentences.translationEn: Hana was shy and did not speak in front of people.

sentences.arabic: فِي يَوْمٍ مَا تَكَلَّمَتْ فِي الصَّفِّ وَأَجَابَتْ بِشَكْلٍ صَحِيحٍ.
sentences.translation: Jednog dana govorila je u razredu i odgovorila ispravno.
sentences.translationEn: One day she spoke in class and answered correctly.

sentences.translation: Drugovi su joj pljeskali a učitelj se nasmiješio.
sentences.translationEn: Her classmates clapped for her and the teacher smiled.

sentences.translation: Osjetila je samopouzdanje i počela govoriti više.
sentences.translationEn: She felt confident and began to speak more.
